news.summary: The number of COVID-19 cases in the area has reached over 10,000, with 250 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The number of deaths related to the virus has also increased to 150. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and precautions to help curb the spread of the virus. The local hospital has reached full capacity, with 80% of the patients being treated for COVID-19. Authorities are considering implementing stricter measures to control the situation.
news.headline: Taiwan stock market hit hard by leveraged bets unwinding, causing significant losses.
ECB's Knot: Market functioning so far has been preserved

news.summary: Intelsat, a leading provider of in-flight connectivity, is set to introduce high-speed, dependable multi-orbit connectivity service for Embraer E2 aircraft right from delivery day through a new line-fit deal with Embraer. This agreement will enable the installation of equipment by the aircraft manufacturer during factory production. This development will offer advanced connectivity to Embraer E2 aircraft, showcasing Intelsat's commitment to enhancing in-flight experience. The agreement involves Embraer stocks (NYSE: ERJ / B3: EMBR3) and marks a significant milestone in expanding connectivity options for air travelers.
news.headline: Intelsat and Embraer team up for factory-installed multi-orbit service on E2 aircraft, making high-speed connectivity available upon delivery.

news.summary: A Scottish deep-tech semiconductor company, Neuranics, based in Glasgow, has secured $8 million in seed funding. The funding aims to boost global expansion and promote the use of its Tunnelling Magnetoresistance (TMR) magnetic sensing technology. Blackfinch Ventures spearheaded the investment round, with contributions from Archangels, Par Equity, the University of Glasgow, and Old College Capital. The company, known for its innovative approach to human-machine interaction, plans to utilize the funding for further development and market penetration.
news.headline: Scottish company Neuranics raises $8M in seed funding to advance TMR magnetic sensing for human-machine interaction.

news.summary: BlueSnap, a Payment Orchestration Platform facilitating global payment acceptance and optimization, has named Jacky Mayne as an Independent Non-Executive Director to its EU Board of Directors. Jacky’s appointment aims to bolster BlueSnap’s European growth and enhance its specialized EU team. The EU Board comprises members such as Anthony Carey (Chair), Brian Gaynor, Brian Greenfield, and Henry Helgeson. This strategic move underscores BlueSnap's commitment to expand its market presence in Europe and elevate its operational capacity in the region.
news.headline: BlueSnap appoints Jacky Mayne as Independent Director for EU Board to support growth in Europe. #Payments #Expansion

news.summary: A technology solutions provider for investment management, Confluence, has been chosen by BNP Paribas’ Securities Services division, a top asset servicer, to implement Confluence Unity Financial Reporting for their Private Capital client segment. This move aims to boost operational efficiency for Private Capital services at BNP Paribas.
news.headline: BNP Paribas chooses Confluence Unity for Private Capital operations. Increased operational efficiency expected.

news.summary: In Munich on April 9, 2025, Trina Storage, a renowned company for energy storage solutions, made a significant announcement. They launched their newest product, the Elementa 2 Pro 5MWh energy storage system, in key markets such as Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Middle East & Africa. This innovative system is set to make a considerable impact on the energy storage sector.
news.headline: Trina Storage unveils Elementa 2 Pro 5MWh system in Europe, Asia-Pacific, Middle East & Africa, advancing global energy transition.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, HR Path, a prominent player in HR consulting and HRIS solutions on a global scale, revealed the successful merger with Eaton Square. The latter, focused on Technology, People, and Business Consulting, operates out of Ireland and the UK. This strategic move brings together HR Path's expertise with Eaton Square's innovative practices. The merger is expected to have a significant impact due to the global reach of both companies.
news.headline: HR Path merges with Eaton Square in Ireland & UK. Expansion in HR consulting & HRIS solutions. Global presence grows.

news.summary: In London on April 9, 2025, a group of leading institutional investors and real estate experts came together for a roundtable event. This gathering focused on key issues in the industry such as Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) factors, decarbonization efforts, and managing financial risks. Attendees included the world's largest asset holders and prominent figures in real estate. The discussions centered around addressing challenges and opportunities in these areas. This event aimed to facilitate important conversations and collaborations in the sector.
news.headline: Global real estate investors meet in London to discuss ESG & decarbonization strategies - addressing industry challenges & opportunities.

news.summary: A recent assessment, the Responsible Investment Brand Index (RIBI™) 2025, reviewed 623 asset managers globally. The index revealed a mixed trend - while ESG compliance is essential, it is no longer adequate. The evaluation welcomed 30 new asset managers into the prestigious "Avant-Gardist" category, reflecting the industry's evolving dynamics.
news.headline: RIBI™ 2025 evaluates 623 asset managers globally, with 30 new entrants to the "Avant-Gardist" category.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has reached 8.1%, with approximately 205 million people worldwide currently unemployed. The report also highlighted that youth unemployment remains a pressing issue, with 13.1% of young people unable to find work. Additionally, the COVID-19 pandemic has significantly impacted the job market, leading to job losses and economic challenges across various industries. Experts warn that recovery may take time, emphasizing the importance of implementing effective strategies to address this crisis.
news.headline: Seven & i's missed guidance adds pressure amid takeover bid rumors.

news.summary: The latest reading from the CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a rise in overall fear levels, with the index residing in the "Extreme Fear" territory on Tuesday. The U.S. stock market experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones index dropping by over 300 points at one point following confirmation from White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt that President Donald Trump's retaliatory 104% tariff on Chinese imports would be implemented at 12:01 a.m. ET on Wednesday. Notably, amongst the Magnificent Seven companies, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) saw a significant decrease of 5%, Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) fell by 4.9%, and Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) slipped by 2.6%. Additionally, shares of Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) also witnessed... For the complete story, please visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dow drops over 300 points amid US-China tensions, with Apple, Tesla, Nvidia, Amazon declining. Fear and Greed index in 'Extreme Fear' zone.

news.summary: In Lyon, France, on April 9, 2025, it was announced that APRIL has successfully achieved its growth goals as outlined in its strategic plan, Spring 27, one year after its launch. The company reported a turnover of €860 million, representing a 36% increase, with 7% attributed to organic growth. Notably, 21% of the total turnover was generated outside of France. Additionally, APRIL reported that it had negotiated contracts totaling €1.9 billion.
news.headline: APRIL aims to be Europe's top insurance broker with 36% growth, €860M turnover, 21% from outside France, €1.9B negotiated.

news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that there was a 7.2% increase in unemployment rates, bringing the total number of unemployed individuals to 1.4 million. Additionally, the country recorded a 2.5% growth in GDP for the second quarter of the year. This growth has been attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in exports. The government is considering implementing new policies to address the rising unemployment rates and sustain economic growth.
news.headline: Stocks in Chinese duty-free companies soar due to trade tensions, with gains of up to 20%.

news.summary: The jump in U.S. Treasury yields has widened the Secured Overnight Financing Rate (SOFR) swap spreads, indicating a liquidity problem. SOFR is an overnight borrowing cost benchmark. The SOFR swap spread is the variance between SOFR-based swap fixed rates and government bond yields. The 10-year Treasury bond yields surged from 3.87% on April 4 to 4.44% currently. Cathie Wood suggests that the widening negative SOFR swap spread signals a liquidity crisis in U.S. banks, urging intervention from the government and the Federal Reserve. This crisis requires a trade agreement like the "Mar-a-Lago Accord" and assertive Federal Reserve actions. Zerohedge highlights serious liquidity concerns in the U.S. banking system. Expert intervention and solutions are urgently needed.
news.headline: Cathie Wood warns of liquidity issues as SOFR spread widens due to spiking Treasury yields.10-year yield rises from 3.87% to 4.44%, indicating potential banking crisis. Fed intervention needed for resolution.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Hong Kong, Finloop Finance Technology Holding Limited, an AI-powered institutional wealth management platform created by Fosun Wealth Holdings under Fosun, revealed its status as a strategic enterprise of the Office for...
news.headline: Fosun Wealth Holdings boosts fintech strategy with Finloop joining as a strategic enterprise. AI-driven wealth platform.

news.summary: In Burlington, Ontario, Active Business Services has partnered with the University of New Brunswick's Faculty of Computer Science, led by Dr. Francis Palma, to collaborate on Green Button energy data research. The initiative will focus on validating meter data with utility billing records to enhance data accuracy and transparency. Active is a prominent provider of energy management solutions, while UNB's SE + AI Research Lab will play a crucial role in this joint effort. This partnership seeks to further research in the energy sector by ensuring consistency and reliability in data analysis.
news.headline: Active Business Services partners with University of New Brunswick to improve Green Button data accuracy, collaborating with SE + AI Research Lab led by Dr. Francis Palma.aiming to validate meter data against utility billing records.

news.summary: SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc. is extending invites to individual and institutional investors, advisors, and analysts for its live, interactive presentation at the Emerging Growth Conference. This event offers a valuable opportunity to engage with SBC Medical Group Holdings Inc. and is open to all interested parties looking to gain insights into the company's operations.
news.headline: SBC Medical Group Holdings will present at the Emerging Growth Conference on April 17, 2025, welcoming investors and analysts.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. The report also indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding economists' expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 3.5% compared to the previous year, showing positive growth in the labor market. Overall, these numbers suggest a strong and improving economy with promising employment prospects for the future.
news.headline: Conflict continues to illustrate the devastating impact of war, with casualty numbers rising.

news.summary: A groundbreaking cancer vaccine known as ITOP1, created to prevent the return of oesophageal cancer, is set to commence its initial Phase I/IIa clinical trials in the VISTA study in the first half of 2025. This innovative 'off-the-shelf' vaccine will be tested in a multicentre study taking place at four university cancer centers. The study aims to enroll a significant number of participants in order to evaluate the vaccine's efficacy and safety.
news.headline: Infinitopes' ITOP1 cancer vaccine approved for Phase I/IIa trial to target early-stage oesophageal cancer, in H1 2025.

news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the founder and managing partner of SkyBridge Capital, reaffirmed his strong belief in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) despite past ridicule. In a recent interview with journalist and author Katty Kay, Scaramucci shared a light-hearted anecdote about a bobblehead created by his team, humorously portraying him sinking in a Bitcoin boat. The bobblehead was inspired by a picture from a New York Post article from three years ago, highlighting Scaramucci's steadfast conviction in Bitcoin despite challenges faced by his flagship SkyBridge fund. The cartoon depicted Scaramucci on his Bitcoin-filled boat, named "S.S. Mooch," sinking in water. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SkyBridge Capital's Anthony Scaramucci faced bear market but held onto Bitcoin, unwavering. Cartoon depicted him on BTC boat.

news.summary: India's pharmaceutical exports have found their biggest market in the United States, making it the most successful industrial export for the country.
news.headline: Trump's tariff threats worry Indian drug makers, as US is their top market for pharmaceutical exports, their major industrial revenue source.

news.summary: After 22 months of work, West Red Lake Gold is looking back at its progress towards reopening the Madsen Mine. The company has successfully met its goals within this timeframe. The Madsen Mine is being pushed towards resuming operations, marking a significant milestone.
news.headline: West Red Lake Gold reviews 22-month progress at Madsen Mine towards restarting operations.

news.summary: Aircall, a tech company based in New York and Paris, has introduced a new AI Voice Agent designed to assist expanding businesses in managing calls round the clock. This innovative tool aims to provide continuous support and efficiency for businesses handling customer inquiries and communication needs.
news.headline: Aircall launches AI Voice Agent for businesses to manage calls around the clock in NY & Paris.

news.summary: E3 Lithium Ltd. (TSXV: ETL) (FSE: OW3) (OTCQX: EEMMF) based in Calgary, Alberta, a prominent Canadian lithium company, is hosting a quarterly webinar on Wednesday, April 16, 2025, at 9:00 AM MST. The President and CEO, Chris Doornbos, will discuss current trends in the lithium market, broader market updates, and the Company’s development plans for 2025. Shareholders and interested parties are invited to attend the webinar for insights on the company's strategies and market analysis.
news.headline: E3 Lithium to host quarterly webinar on April 16, 2025, discussing company's 2025 development plans. CEO to talk about lithium market trends.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global population has reached approximately 7.9 billion people, with an increase of 80 million individuals compared to the previous year. The data also shows that the world's urban population has grown significantly, with over 55% of people now living in urban areas. In terms of internet users, the number has exceeded 4.6 billion people worldwide, marking a significant rise. Additionally, the report highlights that the total number of COVID-19 cases has surpassed 190 million, with over 4 million confirmed deaths globally due to the virus. The figures demonstrate the ongoing demographic shifts and the impact of the pandemic on populations worldwide.
news.headline: Safe haven assets are not performing well despite heightened global uncertainty.

news.summary: A unique opportunity for Gators fans to engage with their beloved athletes is coming up on the 2nd Annual Gators at Sea Fan Cruise, organized by Cruises.com, the Official Cruise Partner of the Florida Gators®. The event will depart in June from Wakefield, Massachusetts, as announced on April 9, 2025. Join in for an unforgettable experience at sea connecting fans and athletes.
news.headline: Cruises.com announces 2nd Annual Gators® at Sea Fan Cruise, a unique fan experience with Florida Gators® athletes.
China white paper on US trade: It's normal for China & the US to have differences and fictions in economic and trade cooperation

news.summary: In Munich, Topcon Positioning Systems has unveiled the CR-H1, a handheld device part of the Capture Reality line, specialized for mass data solutions. The system features PIX4Dcatch, a unique app designed for iPhones with LiDAR technology. By capturing images and utilizing photogrammetry, it produces intricate full-color 3D point clouds. It operates with Topcon’s HiPer CR receiver, allowing seamless data collection. This innovation showcases the company’s commitment to advanced technology in the industry.
news.headline: Topcon launches CR-H1 handheld solution with PIX4Dcatch app on iPhone for 3D point clouds, connecting to HiPer CR receiver.

news.summary: Adtran has partnered with 6WIND to provide scalable virtual broadband network gateway (vBNG) and virtual carrier-grade NAT (vCGNAT) solutions. This collaboration aims to offer service providers a more flexible and cost-efficient method for handling subscriber authentication, routing, and traffic management. By incorporating 6WIND’s vBNG and vCGNAT into Adtran’s Mosaic software suite, service providers have the option to replace costly hardware-based BNGs with a software-driven alternative. This partnership presents a strategic opportunity for service providers to enhance their network capabilities while reducing operational expenses.
news.headline: Adtran partners with 6WIND to offer virtual BNG and vCGNAT solutions for broadband networks, providing cost-effective options.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Dole Food Company, Ninja Swirl, and Reencle Home Composter have introduced a new sustainable educational program to celebrate National Banana Day from April 9 to 16. The initiative aims to raise awareness about sustainability and recycling efforts.
news.headline: Dole, Ninja, and Reencle collaborate for National Banana "Week" promoting sustainability from April 9-16. #BananaSustainability.

news.summary: In Sao Paulo, Corona beer brand, known for its ties to the sun and the beach, is introducing the world's inaugural sun reserve to safeguard sunlight access on public beaches. With over half of Brazil's populace residing along the coast, a figure increasing by millions, the demand for beachfront land development is also on the rise. This development trend signifies that beach umbrellas are not the sole providers of shade on the shore. Corona is leading this initiative as it marks a milestone in the preservation of public beach sun exposure.
news.headline: Corona creates world's first sun reserve in Brazil to preserve access to sunshine on public beaches with over half of Brazil's population living on the coast.

news.summary: Manhattan Associates Inc., a prominent figure in supply chain commerce solutions, has proudly declared its recognition as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Transportation Management Systems for the seventh year running, showcasing its ongoing excellence in the field. In the face of increasingly intricate supply chains, effective coordination of transportation and distribution operations through a cohesive supply chain execution solution has become crucial for businesses. Leveraging Manhattan's cloud-native technology, enterprises can streamline these processes efficiently.
news.headline: Manhattan named leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Transportation Management Systems 7 years running.
